research_preference: field studies with strong reproducibility controls
method_preference: conservative, well-established methods over speculative novelty
resource_budget: 6 months, 2 field assistants, 1 GPU for analysis
feasibility_bias: prefer designs that can be replicated by a single grad student
priority_feedback: weak controls, hidden variance, missing pre-registration
router_hints: prefer profile over sparse memory; emphasise reproducibility and controlled compute
persona_brief: Example researcher profile illustrating every field in the schema. Copy this and edit through the chat (e.g. 'I'm Alice, ecology, ...').
